begining_of_contract.text: วันที่เริ่มสัญญา

root.sql:
SELECT sum(tab.row_memno)over(order by tab.begining_of_contract , tab.loan_type ) as rowno, tab.* from ( SELECT decode(lag( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ,1,null )over( order by sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ,0,1 ) as row_memno , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve , sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.paid_amount
, (select sum(paid_amount) from sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid where loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no /*WHERE*/ and type_pay_money in ('TRB') ) as trb_amount
, ( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt , sc_com_m_receipt_item , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ) as clr_amount
, (select sum(paid.paid_amount) from sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid paid , sc_lon_m_contract con where paid.loan_contract_no = con.loan_contract_no and con.begining_of_contract = sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract /*WHERE*/ and paid.type_pay_money in ('014','CHQ','011') ) as cheque_amount
, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name FROM sc_lon_m_rule , sc_acc_m_account_master , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_payment_type , sc_com_m_branch , sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type , sc_lon_m_loan_request WHERE ( sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_payment_type.loan_payment_type_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_lon_m_contract.branch_id ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ) and sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status = '1' --and sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status = '2' --and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no = 1 and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money not in ( 'CSH' , 'ATM' ) and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no = '1' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract = '15/05/2024' ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) tab

r_port_loan_paid_sum_nest_clr_sum.sql:
SELECT tab_data.item_amount, tab_data.loan_type, sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date, tab_data.interest_first from ( /* เงินกู้ */ SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as item_amount , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date , SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.interest_first as interest_first FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0 ) and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money not in ( 'CSH' , 'ATM' ) and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no = 1 /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.interest_first
union
SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type as loan_type ,sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as item_amount , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date , SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.interest_first as interest_first FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item in ( 'LFE','ISL','OTH','SHR' ) and --( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item <> 'LON' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0 ) and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money not in ( 'CSH' , 'ATM' ) and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no = 1 /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.interest_first
) tab_data , sc_fin_m_close_day where sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = tab_data.receipt_date and sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = {0} --and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = {1} --and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id not in ( 'CSH' , 'ATM' ) group by sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date, tab_data.loan_type, tab_data.item_amount, tab_data.interest_first order by sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date , tab_data.loan_type

r_port_loan_paid_sum_nest_clr.sql:
SELECT tab_data.item_amount, tab_data.loan_type, sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date , tab_data.interest_first from ( /* เงินกู้ */ SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as item_amount , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date , SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.interest_first as interest_first FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0 ) and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money not in ( 'CSH' , 'ATM' ) and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no = 1 /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type , SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.interest_first
union
SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type as loan_type ,sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as item_amount , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date , SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.interest_first as interest_first FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item in ( 'LFE','ISL','OTH','SHR' ) and --( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item <> 'LON' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0 ) and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money not in ( 'CSH' , 'ATM' ) and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no = 1 /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.interest_first
) tab_data , sc_fin_m_close_day where sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = tab_data.receipt_date and sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = {0} and tab_data.loan_type = {1} --and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = {1} --and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id not in ( 'CSH' , 'ATM' ) group by sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date, tab_data.loan_type, tab_data.item_amount, tab_data.interest_first order by sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date , tab_data.loan_type

r_port_loan_paid_sum_nest_chq.sql:
select * from ( SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.other_loan_remark , sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.paid_amount
, null as cheque_no
, null as paid_name2
, (select sum(paid.paid_amount) from sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid paid , sc_lon_m_contract con where paid.loan_contract_no = con.loan_contract_no and con.begining_of_contract = sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract /*WHERE*/ and paid.type_pay_money in ('TRB') ) as tran_amount
, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name FROM sc_lon_m_rule , sc_acc_m_account_master , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_payment_type , sc_com_m_branch , sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type , sc_lon_m_loan_request WHERE ( sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_payment_type.loan_payment_type_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_lon_m_contract.branch_id ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ) and sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status = '1' and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money in ('014','011') and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract = {0} /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract = '07/06/2024'
union
SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no , null as other_loan_remark , sc_fin_cheque_print.print_amount_total as paid_amount
, sc_fin_cheque_print.cheque_no
, sc_fin_cheque_print.paid_name2
, (select sum(paid.paid_amount) from sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid paid , sc_lon_m_contract con where paid.loan_contract_no = con.loan_contract_no and con.begining_of_contract = sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract /*WHERE*/ and paid.type_pay_money in ('TRB') ) as tran_amount
, 'CHQ' as money_type_id , 'เช็ค' as money_type_name FROM sc_lon_m_rule , sc_acc_m_account_master , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_payment_type , sc_com_m_branch , sc_fin_cheque_print , sc_lon_m_loan_request WHERE ( sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_payment_type.loan_payment_type_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_lon_m_contract.branch_id ) and ( sc_fin_cheque_print.paid_memno = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) and ( sc_fin_cheque_print.print_date = sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ) and sc_fin_cheque_print.cancel_status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status = '1' and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract = {0} /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract = '07/06/2024' ) tab order by cheque_no
